regulations.title: Karnataka PT Monthly Slab
regulations.description: Monthly Professional Tax deduction for employees earning above ₹25,000 in Karnataka.

regulations.title: Maharashtra PT Monthly Slab
regulations.description: Monthly deduction for employees in Maharashtra (₹300 in February).

regulations.title: West Bengal Late Filing Penalty
regulations.description: Penalty of ₹200 for the first month of delay in filing the PT return.

regulations.title: Annual Consolidated PT Return
regulations.description: Annual return must be filed by March 31st for the preceding financial year.
